sentence: וַיִּתֵּן אֹתָם אֱלֹהִים בִּרְקִיעַ הַשָּׁמַיִם לְהָאִיר עַל־הָאָרֶץ

dictionary-meaning.וַיִּתֵּן: Then Elohim assigned and set them in place — disclosing the functional positioning of the regulators (Rule 21).

main-translation: ***Then Elohim assigned and set them in place within the hammered-out expanse of the skies to illuminate the material foundation of the physical world.***

main-translation-explanation.assigned and set them in place: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Disclosed the 'Natan' agency as a functional positioning (Rule 21).

rejected-translations.reason: Thin; fails to disclose the 'assignment' aspect of the verb.
